# outputs/tlf/

This folder contains the **TLF outputs** (Tables, Listings, Figures) generated by the TLF programs.

## Generated files (after running programs)

| File | Output ID | Title |
|------|-----------|-------|
| `t_14_1_1_demog.rtf` | Table 14.1.1 | Demographic and Baseline Characteristics (Safety Population) |
| `l_16_2_7_ae.rtf` | Listing 16.2.7 | Listing of All Adverse Events (Safety Population) |

## Markdown previews (included in repository)

Since RTF files require SAS to generate and are excluded from version control, markdown previews computed from the simulated source data are provided for visibility:

| Preview file | Corresponds to |
|---|---|
| [`t_14_1_1_demog.md`](t_14_1_1_demog.md) | Table 14.1.1 — Demographics |
| [`l_16_2_7_ae.md`](l_16_2_7_ae.md) | Listing 16.2.7 — All Adverse Events |

## Format

All TLFs are generated as **RTF** (Rich Text Format) files using `ODS RTF` in SAS, formatted for regulatory submission (FDA/EMA).

Each output includes:
- Study identifier header (STUDY001)
- Output number and title
- Treatment group columns
- Standard footnotes with program name and generation date

## How to generate

TLF programs require ADaM datasets to exist first:
```
programs/tlf/t_14_1_1_demog.sas   (requires adam.adsl)
programs/tlf/l_16_2_7_ae.sas      (requires adam.adae)
```

## Opening outputs

Open `.rtf` files in Microsoft Word or LibreOffice Writer.
